8:["$","p",null,{"children":"Entity extraction identifies proper nouns, handles, hashtags, and quoted phrases in memory content, storing them as triples for fuzzy entity-aware recall."}]
9:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L1b",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[false,["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Entity extraction is ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"opt-in"}],". Pass ",["$","code",null,{"children":"extract_entities=True"}]," to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"remember()"}],". It adds ~0.01ms overhead per extraction."]}]}]]}]]}]}]

c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Usage"}]
d:["$","$L1c",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\nmid = mem.remember(\n  \"Abdias founded Mnemosyne in New York\",\n  importance=0.9,\n  extract_entities=True\n)\n\n# Entities stored as triples:\n# (mid, \"mentions\", \"Abdias\")\n# (mid, \"mentions\", \"Mnemosyne\")\n# (mid, \"mentions\", \"New York\")\n","language":"python"}]
e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Fuzzy Matching"}]
f:["$","$L1c",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne.core.entities import find_similar_entities\n\nmatches = find_similar_entities(\n  \"Abdias\",\n  [\"Abdias J\", \"Python\", \"New York\"],\n  threshold=0.7\n)\n# Returns: [(\"Abdias J\", 0.925)]\n","language":"python"}]
10:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Trade-offs"}]
11:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Aspect"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Full NLP (spaCy)"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Speed"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~0.01ms per extraction"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Heavier"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Dependencies"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Zero"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"spaCy + model (~50MB)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Accuracy"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Good for proper nouns"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Higher recall"}]]}]]}]]}]
